# פאנל פלוס — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A comic book store with a passion for the world of comics, graphic novels, and pop culture. The brand likely carries a vibrant, creative, and enthusiastic energy that appeals to fans of superheroes, manga, indie comics, and beyond. The store aims to be a destination for collectors and casual readers alike, celebrating the art and storytelling of the comic medium.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About פאנל פלוס
A comic book store with a passion for the world of comics, graphic novels, and pop culture. The brand likely carries a vibrant, creative, and enthusiastic energy that appeals to fans of superheroes, manga, indie comics, and beyond. The store aims to be a destination for collectors and casual readers alike, celebrating the art and storytelling of the comic medium.

## Target Audience
- חובבי קומיקס מושבעים
- חובבי תרבות פופ
- קוראי צעירים

## Industry
קמעונאות / תרבות פופ

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
